caption: A person holds a large sports trading card featuring two images of baseball player Tim Raines, one in a red jersey and one in a blue, white, and red uniform. The card displays the text "TIM R.A.I.N.E.S" in bold letters at the bottom and contains an autograph. In the background, a man with a beard wearing a dark t-shirt sits in a chair in a room filled with stacks of trading cards. A digital overlay appears on the screen, showing the "JASPYS" logo and the website "CASEBREAKS.COM". As the sequence progresses, the person holding the card slightly tilts it, causing a shift in the lighting and reflection on the card's surface. The man in the background remains seated, looking toward the camera while the card is presented in the foreground.
